summary: Tested Signup Country/Region/Language feature: Backend POST /api/auth/register correctly accepts and stores country, region, language fields. Frontend Signup page shows Country/Pays dropdown with US and Belgium options. Belgium selection shows Region and Language dropdowns with auto-language selection based on region. Plan cards show EUR pricing for Belgium, USD for US. Validation prevents submission without region when Belgium selected. Full signup flow with Belgium/Wallonie redirects to dashboard with correct profile. Login regression test passed.

issues: Shows US lawyers (Sarah Mitchell, Archer Carter, Diana Torres) for Belgian users instead of Belgian lawyers. This is outside the scope of signup testing but noted for future improvement.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Belgium/Wallonie/fr-BE stores correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Belgium/Flandre/nl-BE stores correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Belgium/Bruxelles-Capitale/fr-BE stores correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with Belgium/Communaute germanophone/de-BE stores correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with US defaults to country=US, language=en
Backend: POST /api/auth/register without country field defaults to US/en (backwards compat)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register sets httpOnly session cookie
Backend: Registered user profile persists correctly via GET /api/auth/me
Backend: Duplicate email registration rejected with 409
Backend: Login with existing Belgian user (test_cg@example.com) works
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
Frontend: Signup page shows Country/Pays dropdown with US and Belgium options
Frontend: Default country is US
Frontend: Region/Language dropdowns hidden when US selected
Frontend: Region/Language dropdowns visible when Belgium selected
Frontend: Default language for Belgium is fr-BE
Frontend: Plan cards show USD pricing ($0/$69) when US selected
Frontend: Plan cards show EUR pricing (0/65 EUR) when Belgium selected
Frontend: Belgian info box visible when Belgium selected
Frontend: Flandre region auto-sets language to nl-BE
Frontend: Communaute germanophone auto-sets language to de-BE
Frontend: Wallonie region auto-sets language to fr-BE
Frontend: Bruxelles-Capitale region auto-sets language to fr-BE
Frontend: Region/Language dropdowns hide when switching back to US
Frontend: Validation error shown when Belgium selected but no region chosen
Frontend: Full signup flow with Belgium/Wallonie/Pro redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Login flow with Belgian user redirects to dashboard

test_credentials.us_test_user: test@example.com / testpassword123 (NOT SEEDED in database - mentioned in test_credentials.md but doesn't exist)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique emails (test_signup_*, test_e2e_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup country/region/language feature fully tested. Backend POST /api/auth/register accepts country (US|BE), region (string), language (string) fields. Frontend Signup.js has Country/Pays dropdown that shows Region/Language dropdowns when Belgium selected. Region auto-sets language: Flandre→nl-BE, Communaute germanophone→de-BE, others→fr-BE. Plan cards show EUR pricing for Belgium. Validation prevents submission without region for Belgium. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_signup_country_region.py can be reused for regression testing. Note: US test user test@example.com mentioned in test_credentials.md is NOT seeded in database.

belgium_region_selector.options: WORKING - Wallonie, Bruxelles-Capitale, Flandre, Communaute germanophone
belgium_region_selector.validation: WORKING - Cannot submit without region when Belgium selected

belgium_language_selector.visibility: WORKING - Shows when Belgium selected, hides when US selected

plan_pricing.belgium_pricing: WORKING - Shows 0 EUR / mois and 65 EUR / mois

backend_register.backwards_compat: WORKING - Defaults to US/en when no country provided
